description: ai-memory v0.7.0 — Claude Code project settings. Pinned 2026-05-19 alongside the v0.7.0 SHIP-RECOMMENDED memo on issue #836.

notes: rust-analyzer must be installed: `rustup component add rust-analyzer`
Initial workspace indexing on this 200k+ LOC codebase takes 2-5 minutes; subsequent sessions are warm.
checkOnSave disabled because `cargo check` on this workspace is heavy + tests are gated separately by CI.
Memory ceiling: rust-analyzer can take 2-4 GB resident. On hosts with <16 GB free, expect index OOM under concurrent cargo/llvm-cov load.
Per CLAUDE.md project hard rule: no agent-created files under /tmp, /var/tmp, /private/tmp.
These permissions are enforced by convention + the SessionStart hook; the .deny list below makes them version-controlled.
